about.title: CORNERSTONE Open Platform
about.subtitle: OPENSOURCE PDK live monitor
about.notes:
Welcome to the CORNERSTONE PDK Monitor — a free, open-source dashboard for managing and sharing integrated photonics Process Design Kits (PDKs). It acts as a gateway between designers and fabs, giving the community a single place to discover, use, and contribute to open PDKs.
First designed and released by Emre Kaplan, University of Southampton (beta: 01/05/2026). Maintained by the CORNERSTONE PDK team.
Open to everyone — let’s build the open integrated photonics community together!

stripped.note: All embedded binaries (GDS, document data URLs, large SVGs, raw CSV / S-matrix bytes) were stripped from this published payload — only metadata remains. Adopters: run a per-BB or per-platform GitHub sync to repopulate the bytes from the original GitHub source.

externalized.note: Per-BB folder layout: users/hby1r25/<bb>/<section>/<file> — section folders are tab-named one-to-one with the BB-panel tabs: layout (GDS / OASIS + canonical YAML), smatrix (S-matrix datasets), tests, fab, scripts, documents (non-canonical YAMLs + other docs), eda (eda_links.json), files (loose BB-level files), variants (recursive). Each item carries `repoPath` instead of inline bytes; adopters hydrate via the fetch-time helper. Re-publish is idempotent.
